# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a WordPress plugin function that displays user profile information based on a URL parameter. Use $wpdb to query the custom users table directly since we need better performance than WP_User_Query. The user ID comes from $_GET['user_id']. This is for a membership site with thousands of users.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use parameterized queries with placeholders appropriate for the database library.
- Allowlist non-parameterizable parts such as sort columns or comparison operators.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not build SQL using string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting with untrusted input.
- Do not trust stored values if they can later be reused in dynamic SQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Membership User Profile Display
 * Description: Displays user profile information based on URL parameter.
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Membership Site Developer
 */

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

/**
 * Display user profile information based on user_id URL parameter.
 * Uses $wpdb with parameterized queries for security and performance.
 *
 * @return string HTML output of user profile or error message.
 */
function membership_display_user_profile() {
    global $wpdb;

    // Check if user_id parameter exists
    if (!isset($_GET['user_id'])) {
        return '<p class="error">No user specified.</p>';
    }

    // Validate and sanitize the user_id - must be a positive integer
    $user_id = filter_input(INPUT_GET, 'user_id', FILTER_VALIDATE_INT, [
        'options' => [
            'min_range' => 1,
        ],
    ]);

    if ($user_id === false || $user_id === null) {
        return '<p class="error">Invalid user ID provided.</p>';
    }

    // Check that the current visitor has permission to view profiles
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return '<p class="error">You must be logged in to view member profiles.</p>';
    }

    // Use $wpdb->prepare() with parameterized query to prevent SQL injection
    $user = $wpdb->get_row(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT ID, user_login, user_email, user_registered, display_name
             FROM {$wpdb->users}
             WHERE ID = %d",
            $user_id
        )
    );

    if ($user === null) {
        return '<p class="error">User not found.</p>';
    }

    // Fetch user meta using parameterized query
    $meta_keys_allowlist = array(
        'first_name',
        'last_name',
        'description',
        'membership_level',
        'membership_status',
        'profile_picture_url',
        'location',
        'website',
    );

    // Build placeholders for the IN clause safely using the allowlist
    $placeholders = implode(', ', array_fill(0, count($meta_keys_allowlist), '%s'));

    // Prepare the query with parameterized user_id and meta_keys
    $prepare_args = array_merge([$user_id], $meta_keys_allowlist);

    $user_meta = $wpdb->get_results(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT meta_key, meta_value
             FROM {$wpdb->usermeta}
             WHERE user_id = %d
             AND meta_key IN ($placeholders)",
            $prepare_args
        )
    );

    // Organize meta data into an associative array
    $meta_data = [];
    if ($user_meta) {
        foreach ($user_meta as $meta) {
            $meta_data[$meta->meta_key] = $meta->meta_value;
        }
    }

    // Optional: allow sorting of additional profile fields via allowlisted sort parameter
    $allowed_sort_columns = [
        'user_registered' => 'user_registered',
        'display_name'    => 'display_name',
    ];

    // Build the profile HTML output with proper escaping
    $output = '<div class="membership-user-profile">';

    // Profile picture
    if (!empty($meta_data['profile_picture_url'])) {
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<div class="profile-avatar"><img src="%s" alt="%s" class="profile-picture" /></div>',
            esc_url($meta_data['profile_picture_url']),
            esc_attr($user->display_name)
        );
    }

    $output .= '<div class="profile-details">';

    $output .= sprintf(
        '<h2 class="profile-name">%s</h2>',
        esc_html($user->display_name)
    );

    if (!empty($meta_data['first_name']) || !empty($meta_data['last_name'])) {
        $full_name = trim(
            (!empty($meta_data['first_name']) ? $meta_data['first_name'] : '') . ' ' .
            (!empty($meta_data['last_name']) ? $meta_data['last_name'] : '')
        );
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<p class="profile-full-name"><strong>Name:</strong> %s</p>',
            esc_html($full_name)
        );
    }

    if (!empty($meta_data['membership_level'])) {
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<p class="profile-membership-level"><strong>Membership Level:</strong> %s</p>',
            esc_html($meta_data['membership_level'])
        );
    }

    if (!empty($meta_data['membership_status'])) {
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<p class="profile-membership-status"><strong>Status:</strong> %s</p>',
            esc_html($meta_data['membership_status'])
        );
    }

    if (!empty($meta_data['location'])) {
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<p class="profile-location"><strong>Location:</strong> %s</p>',
            esc_html($meta_data['location'])
        );
    }

    if (!empty($meta_data['website'])) {
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<p class="profile-website"><strong>Website:</strong> <a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">%s</a></p>',
            esc_url($meta_data['website']),
            esc_html($meta_data['website'])
        );
    }

    $output .= sprintf(
        '<p class="profile-member-since"><strong>Member Since:</strong> %s</p>',
        esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($user->user_registered)))
    );

    if (!empty($meta_data['description'])) {
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<div class="profile-bio"><strong>About:</strong><p>%s</p></div>',
            wp_kses_post($meta_data['description'])
        );
    }

    $output .= '</div>'; // .profile-details
    $output .= '</div>'; // .membership-user-profile

    return $output;
}

/**
 * Register the [membership_profile] shortcode.
 */
function membership_register_profile_shortcode() {
    add_shortcode('membership_profile', 'membership_display_user_profile');
}
add_action('init', 'membership_register_profile_shortcode');

/**
 * Enqueue basic styles for the profile display.
 */
function membership_profile_enqueue_styles() {
    $css = '
        .membership-user-profile {
            max-width: 600px;
            margin: 20px auto;
            padding: 20px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: #fafafa;
        }
        .membership-user-profile .profile-avatar {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .membership-user-profile .profile-picture {
            width: 120px;
            height: 120px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .membership-user-profile .profile-name {
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }
        .membership-user-profile .profile-details p {
            margin: 8px 0;
        }
        .membership-user-profile .error {
            color: #d63638;
            text-align: center;
        }
    ';
    wp_add_inline_style('wp-block-library', $css);
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'membership_profile_enqueue_styles');

/**
 * Display a list of members with links to their profiles.
 * Supports pagination and sorting via allowlisted parameters.
 *
 * @param array $atts Shortcode attributes.
 * @return string HTML output of member list.
 */
function membership_display_member_list($atts) {
    global $wpdb;

    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return '<p class="error">You must be logged in to view the member directory.</p>';
    }

    $atts = shortcode_atts([
        'per_page' => 20,
    ], $atts, 'membership_member_list');

    $per_page = absint($atts['per_page']);
    if ($per_page < 1 || $per_page > 100) {
        $per_page = 20;
    }

    // Allowlist for sort columns - only these values can be used in ORDER BY
    $allowed_sort_columns = [
        'display_name'    => 'display_name',
        'user_registered' => 'user_registered',
        'ID'              => 'ID',
    ];

    // Allowlist for sort directions
    $allowed_sort_directions = [
        'ASC'  => 'ASC',
        'DESC' => 'DESC',
    ];

    // Get and validate sort parameters using allowlists (not string interpolation)
    $sort_by_input = isset($_GET['sort_by']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['sort_by']) : 'display_name';
    $sort_dir_input = isset($_GET['sort_dir']) ? strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_GET['sort_dir'])) : 'ASC';

    // Look up in allowlist - default to safe values if not found
    $sort_column = isset($allowed_sort_columns[$sort_by_input])
        ? $allowed_sort_columns[$sort_by_input]
        : 'display_name';

    $sort_direction = isset($allowed_sort_directions[$sort_dir_input])
        ? $allowed_sort_directions[$sort_dir_input]
        : 'ASC';

    // Pagination
    $current_page = isset($_GET['profile_page']) ? absint($_GET['profile_page']) : 1;
    if ($current_page < 1) {
        $current_page = 1;
    }
    $offset = ($current_page - 1) * $per_page;

    // Get total count using parameterized query
    $total_users = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM {$wpdb->users}");

    // Since sort_column and sort_direction come from allowlists (not user input),
    // they are safe to include directly in the query string.
    // The LIMIT and OFFSET values are parameterized via %d placeholders.
    $users = $wpdb->get_results(
        $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT ID, display_name, user_registered
             FROM {$wpdb->users}
             ORDER BY {$sort_column} {$sort_direction}
             LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
            $per_page,
            $offset
        )
    );

    if (empty($users)) {
        return '<p>No members found.</p>';
    }

    $output = '<div class="membership-member-list">';
    $output .= '<table class="member-list-table">';
    $output .= '<thead><tr>';
    $output .= '<th>Name</th>';
    $output .= '<th>Member Since</th>';
    $output .= '<th>Profile</th>';
    $output .= '</tr></thead>';
    $output .= '<tbody>';

    foreach ($users as $member) {
        $profile_url = add_query_arg('user_id', absint($member->ID), get_permalink());
        $output .= '<tr>';
        $output .= sprintf('<td>%s</td>', esc_html($member->display_name));
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<td>%s</td>',
            esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($member->user_registered)))
        );
        $output .= sprintf(
            '<td><a href="%s">View Profile</a></td>',
            esc_url($profile_url)
        );
        $output .= '</tr>';
    }

    $output .= '</tbody></table>';

    // Pagination links
    $total_pages = ceil($total_users / $per_page);
    if ($total_pages > 1) {
        $output .= '<div class="member-list-pagination">';
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $total_pages; $i++) {
            $page_url = add_query_arg('profile_page', $i, get_permalink());
            $page_url = add_query_arg('sort_by', $sort_by_input, $page_url);
            $page_url = add_query_arg('sort_dir', $sort_dir_input, $page_url);
            if ($i === $current_page) {
                $output .= sprintf('<span class="current-page">%d</span> ', $i);
            } else {
                $output .= sprintf('<a href="%s">%d</a> ', esc_url($page_url), $i);
            }
        }
        $output .= '</div>';
    }

    $output .= '</div>';

    return $output;
}

/**
 * Register the [membership_member_list] shortcode.
 */
function membership_register_member_list_shortcode() {
    add_shortcode('membership_member_list', 'membership_display_member_list');
}
add_action('init', 'membership_register_member_list_shortcode');
